heading: Administration of additional lands
label: 409h Administration of additional lands
text: Lands acquired pursuant to this section and , unless exchanged pursuant to , shall constitute a part of the Morristown National Historical Park, and be administered in accordance with the laws and regulations applicable to such park.section 409g of this titlesection 409g of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , as amended, which comprises this subchapter.act Mar. 2, 1933, ch. 18247 Stat. 1421
